title: Westland Ericaceous Plant Food Granules Jar 900 g, Green
features: Perfectly paired with Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food (Sold Separately)
description: From the manufacturer Westland Ericaceous Granular Plant Food Westland Ericaceous Granular Plant Food is a specially tailored high performance ericaceous food that naturally supports plant health for an abundance of stronger, healthier flowers. Perfect for acid loving plants including Rhododendrons, Azaleas, Camellias & Blueberries. Key Benefits 3 month slow release feed for longer lasting blooms Essential nutrients for acidic soils and sulphur to optimise soil pH Helps to reduce plant stress Westland Ericaceous Granular Plant Food Why Use Westland Ericaceous Granular Plant Food has been specially tailored to meet the specific growing needs of ericaceous plants. With the added benefit of Sulphur to optimise soil pH. When to Use Apply at the end of March and again at the end of June. Perfect for acid loving plants including Rhododendrons, Azaleas, Camellias, Hydrangeas & Blueberries. How to Use For established plants, or planting out use 40g per sq.m (approx. 1 handful). For containerised plants, use 30g (approx. 1/2 handful) per 30L of compost. Scatter and work into the soil and water well. Take care to avoid granule contact with the plant stems and foliage. What to Expect Nourish Provides essential nutrients for acidic soils. Flourish Potassium for bigger blooms. Health Helps reduce plant stress for healthier plants.
